query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN website = '' OR website IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as no_website,
  SUM(CASE WHEN phone = '' OR phone IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as no_phone,
  SUM(CASE WHEN grantEmail = '' OR grantEmail IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as no_email,
  SUM(CASE WHEN amount = '' OR amount IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as no_amount,
  SUM(CASE WHEN eligibility = '' OR eligibility IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as no_eligibility,
  SUM(CASE WHEN description = '' OR description IS NULL OR LENGTH(description) < 30 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as short_desc
FROM grants WHERE isActive = 1;
